title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.18 — TWO MODULE BUTTON SIZES, FOR REAL. Root cause found: JUCE getSliderLayout insets a LinearHorizontal slider by getSliderThumbRadius (jmin(7,h*0.25)) on BOTH sides, so every VALUE tile (INPUT/THRESH/DRIVE/MIX...) drew 14px NARROWER than a SELECTOR button (MODE/AUTO REL/WIDTH/TAPE) in the same grid cell — two STD widths, not one. ParamSliderLAF now overrides getSliderLayout to return full localBounds: value tiles and selectors are pixel-identical, and dragging covers the whole tile (was 7px dead at each end). Modules now have EXACTLY two sizes: HERO (2-span) and STD (1-span, matches GRIT WIDTH/TAPE). ALSO REVERTED v0.4.17s out-of-scope changes: LIMITER back to its vertical stack + AUTO LEVEL pill (limW 314->138), SUMMING back to header-row tiles at utility height 32 — those are utility columns, NOT part of the module parts catalog. VERIFY IN ABLETON: in GRIT/COMPRESS/AMBER every tile is either full-row hero or the exact WIDTH/TAPE size; LIMITER + SUMMING look exactly as they did in v0.4.16. OPEN: painted-metal chassis fork.
